summary: Forge IDE final retest PASSED. Hard-reloaded with cache-buster, localStorage cleared, model defaulted to GLM 5.1 (z-ai/glm-5.1), agent mode was already ON by default (button text 'Agent'). Sent 'Create a file named hello.txt with the text Hi there' via chat. Outbound POST /api/ai/chat/stream contained messages array of length 1 with last user content starting with '[AGENT TASK — respond ONLY with <forge-file...' — confirming ChatPanel.jsx line 139 fix (useChatHistory.getState()) is now active in the bundle and the AGENT TASK prefix is properly applied. Within ~12s, GET /api/fs/read?path=hello.txt returned 200 with body {"path":"hello.txt","content":"Hi there\n"}. UI also showed 'Created hello.txt' toast.
passed: Hard reload bypassed cached bundle (cache-buster query + localStorage clear)
Agent mode default state ON (Agent button shows 'Agent' label)
POST /api/ai/chat/stream messages array is non-empty (count=1) — prior empty-array bug fixed
Last user message content contains '[AGENT TASK' prefix
hello.txt created within 60s with content 'Hi there'
UI displays 'Created hello.txt' confirmation toast and agent file action card
notes: Iteration 6 stale-bundle issue is resolved. End-to-end agent flow (chat -> stream -> forge-file action -> fs write) verified. Build is ready for user delivery.
